title: Golden Globe Winner Predictions: One Battle After Another vs Sinners
text: According to Gold Derby's predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes, Paul Thomas Anderson is projected to win Best Film Director for his film 'One Battle After Another'. The publication notes that Anderson's 'gonzo film tackling politics and parenthood is heading into the ceremony with a leading nine nominations' and is 'expected to convert three of those into wins,' including the directing category. This prediction follows Anderson's success at other awards ceremonies this season, including the Critics Choice Awards where he won Best Director the week prior.
